title: Taylor Opportunity Program for Students
doc_html:
CHAPTER 50. TAYLOR OPPORTUNITY PROGRAM FOR STUDENTS

PART I. GENERAL

SUBPART A. AWARDS

§5001. Taylor Opportunity Program for Students

            As part of the Louisiana Taylor Opportunity Program for Students, the state shall provide financial assistance to any eligible student who enrolls on a full-time basis in an eligible college or university to pursue an academic undergraduate degree or skill or occupational training as defined by the administering agency including a vocational or technical education certificate or diploma program or a nonacademic undergraduate degree.

            Acts 2015, No. 227, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 50.  TAYLOR OPPORTUNITY PROGRAM FOR STUDENTS
PART I.  GENERAL
SUBPART A.  AWARDS
§5001.  Taylor Opportunity Program for Students
As part of the Louisiana Taylor Opportunity Program for Students, the state shall
provide financial assistance to any eligible student who enrolls on a full-time basis in an
eligible college or university to pursue an academic undergraduate degree or skill or
occupational training as defined by the administering agency including a vocational or
technical education certificate or diploma program or a nonacademic undergraduate degree.
Acts 2015, No. 227, §1.
